What happens next?

We'll call you

Within 2 hours

Our team will call within 2 hours to confirm details and answer any questions.

Pre-shoot consultation

3–5 days before

A 30-minute call to discuss your vision, locations, and shot list.

The shoot day

Your booked date

We arrive 1 hour early, fully prepared. Just relax and be yourself.

Gallery delivery

3–4 weeks after

Your edited gallery delivered to your private portal within 3–4 weeks.

Preparation Checklist

  • Confirm your venue address with us
  • Share your shot list / must-have moments
  • Discuss outfit colours (avoid neon/white)
  • Plan golden hour timing for outdoor shots
  • Add our number to your contacts
